news.t: First Trust Expands Its Target Outcome Laddered Fund Suite with Three New Strategies

overview.description: The FT Vest Laddered U.S. Equity Equal Weight Buffer ETF (BFEW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund provides US large-cap equity exposure through a laddered portfolio of equal-weight buffer ETFs. The strategy combines capped upside participation with partial downside protection across staggered outcome periods. BFEW was launched on Apr 7, 2026 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Expands Its Target Outcome Laddered Fund Suite with Three New Strategies
